𝗚𝗔𝗠𝗘𝗡𝗔𝗧𝗜𝗩𝗘 | Playing PC games on an Android device.  🔥 Super Hot!

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🤖 Kotlin 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Playing PC games on an Android device.
📅 Created: Apr 2025 • Updated: May 2026

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Play PC games on Android
✅ Steam, Epic Games, GOG integration
✅ Cloud saves support
✅ Automatic game image fetching (via SteamGridDB API Key)


✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 5.9K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 257 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 62 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

GameNative enables Android users to play PC games from Steam, Epic Games, and GOG directly on their mobile devices. It integrates with these platforms to allow installation and playing of owned games, with support for cloud saves and automatic game image fetching.

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

𝗔𝗜𝗣𝗘𝗫 | To provide a privacy-focused, integrated AI-powered automation solution for web browsing tasks directly within the user's existing browser, and to enable AI coding agents to control browser actions.  🌟 Rising Fast!

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a privacy-focused, integrated AI-powered automation solution for web browsing tasks directly within the user's existing browser, and to enable AI coding agents to control browser actions.
📅 Created: Aug 2024 • Updated: May 2026

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Zero Migration: Operates within your current browser.
✅ Open Source: MIT licensed, transparent, auditable, and extensible.
✅ Privacy First: Data stays local, supports Bring Your Own Key (BYOK).
✅ AI Browser Automation: Automates tasks using natural language.
✅ MCP Integration: Connects with AI coding agents for browser control.


⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.2K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 119 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 11 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

AIPex is an open-source browser extension that enables AI-powered automation directly within your existing browser, offering a privacy-first solution without requiring migration to a new browser or workflow. It integrates with AI coding agents via the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for enhanced browser control.

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/AIPexStudio/AIPex

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗗𝗘𝗕𝗨𝗚𝗦𝗪𝗜𝗙𝗧 | To provide iOS developers with an integrated, in-app toolkit for real-time debugging, performance analysis, and interface inspection, simplifying the development and troubleshooting workflow.  🔥 Super Hot!

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🍎 Swift 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide iOS developers with an integrated, in-app toolkit for real-time debugging, performance analysis, and interface inspection, simplifying the development and troubleshooting workflow.
📅 Created: Dec 2023 • Updated: May 2026

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Network Inspector (HTTP/WebSocket monitoring, encryption support)
✅ Performance Monitoring (CPU, memory, FPS, leak detection)
✅ App Tools (Crash reports, console logs, device info)
✅ Interface Tools (Grid overlay, view hierarchy, animation control)


⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 183 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 24 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

DebugSwift is a comprehensive toolkit for iOS developers, offering a suite of tools to enhance the debugging process. It provides features for network inspection, performance monitoring, app diagnostics, and interface analysis, all accessible within the application itself.

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦

Personal AI Infrastructure (PAI) is a framework designed to augment human capabilities by providing an agentic AI system. It aims to act as a 'Life Operating System,' integrating AI to magnify personal productivity and effectiveness.
